chunks.content:
Article: What is your interpretation of the song Sakura Nagashi
[]: What is your interpretation of the song Sakura Nagashi?             Quote Post by KurisuNimii » Sun Jul 26, 2020 8:03 pm What your interpretation of the song Sakura Nagashi? for me is in my view is Shinji's thoughts after Kaworu's death "I just can't believe that we'll never meet again I still can't convey anything"

[]: Re: What is your interpretation of the song Sakura Nagashi?             Quote Post by MirrorUniverseAsuka » Sun Jul 26, 2020 8:17 pm Yeah, I'm pretty sure that's what it is. I like to use it for my own favorite ship, but it's pretty obviously K/S.

[]: Re: What is your interpretation of the song Sakura Nagashi?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 26, 2020 8:30 pm I don't have one. These vocal numbers are deliberately written to invoke a mood more than any specific aspect of the narrative. For me, I feel it's best to just let the poetry do its thing and be an unbound source of imagery and emotion, and not try to impose any unnecessary limitations upon it. I might be weird that way, though.
